title: 1% Lifesteal
author: Robert Blaise
description: Freddy Stern, a twenty-one-year-old cashier, has lived a plain, albeit harsh life. Having been orphaned—twice—he's spent the last ten years working and staying out of trouble. His only aspiration is to save enough money to become an archhuman.

title: Beware of Chicken 5: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: Casualfarmer
description: Jin Rou wanted to be a cultivator. A man powerful enough to defy the heavens. A master of martial arts. A lord of spiritual power. Unfortunately for him, he died, and now I'm stuck in his body. But I think he'd like how things are turning out.

title: An Education in Magical Affairs: An Isekai LitRPG
author: SourpatchHero, Tommy Kerper
description: On Earth, the scrawny Orrin may have been a big nothing, but he had a bigger buddy in his athletic bestie, Daniel. They were inseparable, like two sides of the same coin. But when a tragic accident transported them to an RPG-like reality, that coin got seriously flipped.

title: Requirements
author: SunriseCV
description: Derek has saved villages and maybe even cities from overflowing dungeons. He later helped with the capture of one of the most despicable noblemen in the entire kingdom.

title: Defiance of the Fall 16
author: TheFirstDefier, JF Brink
description: After braving the dangers of the Imperial Graveyard and overcoming betrayal, Zac has succeeded in his goals. The Kan'Tanu leader is dead, and the Eternal Guardians were unleashed upon the cult.

title: A Hero's Choice: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Tommy Kerper, SourpatchHero
description: A former nobody is about to become a major somebody—and learn it's not all it's cracked up to be—in the fourth installment of this LitRPG fantasy adventure.

title: Path of the Berserker 4: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
author: Rick Scott
description: School is out, but my education is just beginning. My trials at Du Gok Bhong Academy pushed me to my limits and then some, fueling my breakthrough into the Sacred Soul Realm.

title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 3
author: XKarnation
description: Ashfallen's pills are attracting the wrong attention. With the conclusion of the alchemy tournament sparking the flames of a civil war between two of the most powerful families in the Blood Lotus Sect, Ashlock and his sect find themselves swept up in the conflict. Eager to rapidly increase their...

title: Nightmare Realm Summoner 2
author: Actus
description: The Apocalypse is the most fun Alex has had in his entire life. He’s having a grand time fighting every challenge the System throws at him—and making up a few of his own along the way. His antics have earned him a few friends…and a hell of a lot more enemies.

title: Rise of the Living Forge 2
author: Actus
description: Book 2 in the next epic LitRPG Saga from Actus, bestselling author of Return of the Runebound Professor.

title: Advent
author: Seth Ring
description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan and Battle Mage Farmer series—Advent is the first in an epic new series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and thrilling adventure that will leave listeners hungry for more.

title: Bog Standard Isekai: Nightmares
author: Miles English
description: The battle of Hammon's Bog is over. The town is free, the undead destroyed, the Witches slain, and the surviving villagers are picking up the remains of their lives.

title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 4
author: XKarnation
description: Ashlock is now half a step into the Nascent Soul Realm. With the long-spanning battle against Nox drawing to a close and the ex-merchant turning over a new leaf, Ashlock and his sect are on the cusp of becoming a regional powerhouse feared by all. However, before they can dominate the world...

title: Dual Class
author: Arthur Inverse
description: What's a city boy to do when he wakes up with a mysterious system glowing before his eyes? As the system forces worlds to merge, Drake confronts his past and new reality, where sharp wit and brutal killings go hand in hand.

title: Apex: A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
author: Seth Ring
description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan series and Battle Mage Farmer—comes Apex, the third book in the epic new series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and thrilling adventure.

title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 1
author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
description: Without any warning, Amber is transported from her dingy student apartment to a fantastical realm with magic, monsters, and a universal System. However, even though she is forcibly ripped from her home and thrust into a dangerous new life, for the first time ever, she finally feels free.

title: Champion: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Plum Parrot
description: Being a hero has its perks, but living for the fight means one must be ready to die for it, in the ninth book of this action-packed LitRPG fantasy series.

title: Dungeon Life 4: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Khenal
description: First, a man became a dungeon core, then the dungeon became a hero, and now comes another incredible level, as this thrilling isekai adventure continues.

title: Earthshaker: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Plum Parrot
description: Every hero must eventually face the fact that each victory only leads to another battle in this fantasy adventure perfect for fans of Dungeon Crawler Carl.

title: Isekai Magus
author: Han Yang
description: Damien was a simple man, cruising on the highway of life. A goddess of temptation lures him into a deal he scoffs at. To him, superstition is for the foolish. Small problem: she's real, her ritual works, and Damien is magically teleported into a strange new realm.
narrator: Landon Reid, Erin Bateman, Marissa Parness, Alex Perone

title: Savage Awakening 4
author: Adastra339
description: After his Superdungeon run, Zane Walker is ranked the most promising prospect in the Dragonspire Galaxy. With the eyes of the world on him and lucrative training offers from two Great Factions, he’s got a target on his back.

title: Hell Difficulty Tutorial 5
author: Cerim
description: Five rules. Five ways to die. And one cockroach that just won't quit.

title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 2
author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
description: The path to godhood has been revealed.

title: Isekai Magus 2
author: Han Yang
description: Join Tribe Moonguard as they continue to improve, adjust, and grow on their epic journey. Damien is no longer the lost and confused Earthling. His magical progression provide powers greater than he ever envisioned and he now commands an expanding army.

title: Gryff 2
author: Marcus Sloss
description: A fantasy tale of adventure, battle, love, and excitement awaits. Gryff readily calls Vin home as he wages war for its protection. Humanity and griffins braces for the inevitable showdown in an epic struggle against the Horde.

title: Sojourner: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Plum Parrot
description: A skilled hero with more kills than he can count discovers not all power has limits—but it sure has a price—as this action-packed series continues.

title: Gryff 1
author: Marcus Sloss
description: A fantasy tale of adventure, battle, love, and excitement awaits. Gryff is a young man who had goals and dreams. They were rapidly ripped away from him in a spiraling series of events. Inserted on a new world, he must achieve a new path. Will you dare to quest with the hero?

title: The Howlers Rise: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: JKSManga
description: A teen lycanthrope learns that being a leader means much more than just being a killer as the action-packed LitRPG fantasy series continues . . .

title: Evolution
author: Seth Ring
description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan series and Battle Mage Farmer—comes the epic fourth installment in this thrilling series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and superhuman adventure.

title: Cultivation Nerd
author: HolyMouse
description: To defy the Heavens, he must earn his masters in magic. For Liu Feng, death isn't the end. Now, he's stuck in a new world with magic that clearly doesn't obey the laws of physics, surrounded by arrogant young masters who seek to advance their power by any means necessary.

title: Sylver Seeker, Books 1-4: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Kennit Kenway
description: After fulfilling the duty all Arch Necromancers are tasked with, the last thing Sylver Sezari expected was to be reborn. He was usually the one reanimating dead things, after all. How ironic. But reborn he was.

title: Isekai Magus 3
author: Han Yang
description: Join Tribe Moonguard as they strive to gain levels, repair their castle city, and fight off endless hordes.

title: Amber the Cursed Berserker: Book 3
author: V.A. Lewis, Azrie
description: Vir is in chaos, and soon Amber will be at the center of it all.

title: Youngest Son of the Black-Hearted
author: Alvin Atwater
description: Am I the villain in a different coat of paint or just the bane of a corrupted empire? I wonder... Around age twenty-seven, they finally caught me off guard.

title: System Awakening
author: Sean Dunning
description: The heroes Terry Fairway once idolized have turned against him, hunting him down at every turn. His grandfather, the ruthless S-ranked necromancer who rules the city, watches from his throne as the people starve and suffer.

title: Spell Weaver
author: OverXelous
description: Alex was just trying to escape his dead-end job and overbearing family. Then the System arrived, bringing with it magic, Rifts, and the chance for ordinary people to become extraordinary.

title: Nine Rivers Sect
author: Greg Tolley
description: He returns again. The past still hurts. But his path continues into a new tomorrow. Su Fang has clawed his way through countless time loops and claimed the spatial fire seed. But behind him lies years of failures, regrets, and unpaid debts.

title: Cultivation Nerd 2
author: HolyMouse
description: Winter has arrived, bringing inevitable disaster to the Blazing Sun Sect.

title: Gryff 3
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Gryff is racing to free Vin from the Horde. The peace accords are gone and epic battles await. Gryff is motivated by his mother Lily the Goddess of Magic to cleanse the Horde with insider tactics. Adventure with Gryff as he strives to save Vin and the Universe!

title: The New Dawn: A Humorous Isekai LitRPG
author: Icalos
description: A one-woman war machine wreaks havoc while exploring her all-too-human heart in the final installment of this fight-filled LitRPG adventure series.

title: The Lost Bloodline
author: M. Tress
description: Keeping his head up and moving forward was what Koda Burke was best at. After having to emancipate himself as a teen and find his own way at a young age, it became part of who he was. The most important part, or so he thought.

title: Unaffiliated Healer
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: After resolving all the pending SPECIAL Quests that had been plaguing him, Thaden is finally ready to evolve his Class, where he can then continue to Level-up past his current limit.

title: System Incursion: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Progression
author: Sean Dunning
description: Terry Fairway came back from the Underworld stronger, faster—changed. But the power he won came at a cost. He saved a world. He might have damned his own.

title: Malicious Influence
author: Alvin Atwater
description: It seems like popularity and enemies in the empire are increasing much too fast... Seventh Thunder Lord, Chen Thunder, has undeniably left his mark on the empire. However, suspicions linger that there may be a mastermind behind the former Chosen One's attack. Could it be true?

title: Gryff 4
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Gryff made the ultimate sacrifice to save those he cherished. Banished into purgatory for two years, his only companion was a five-headed hydra that spoke Horde.

title: Wild Era: A LitRPG Progression Epic
author: David North
description: For 5,000 years, the Wild Era of humanity has reigned supreme, where strength and magic are the source of everything. Kelin Wildfire, once called the Lord of Wildfire and the Archmage of Souls, was mysteriously killed on a battlefield of the Chaos War.

title: Phantom of the Haunted Bog
author: K. Georgiades aka PathOfPen
description: A world-shaking discovery. Elixirs coveted by gods. A frantic escape.

title: Unrestrained Healer
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: After barely surviving an attack by an Adversarial entity, Thaden helps pick up the pieces of the Guild he’d previously joined.

title: Mark of the Crijik 5: The Ascension
author: ThinkTwice
description: Andross Silver’s secret has been revealed to the world. An eighth Marked one, born before his predecessor has passed away.

title: Magus Reborn
author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
description: Kai of the Sorcerer's Tower was one of the last Mages left, barely surviving in a world contaminated with dead mana and ruled by creatures of the dark.

title: The Healer's Way: Book 8
author: Alexey Kovtunov, Oleg Sapphire, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
description: The threats I've been facing in this world, well, it's like playing whack-a-mole. The local aristocrats are still conspiring to put roadblocks in the path of the ever more powerful Bulatov Family. And then I have the offworlders from another world—they haven't gone anywhere, either.

title: Skill Eater 2
author: Magnus Grey
description: While Edge was returning from his latest adventure, Puppet Town received a quest from the System that would either help the settlement survive or seal its fate.

title: Isekai Emperor Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Michael Dalton, Adam Lance
description: In the magic lands of the Fae Wild, the Goblin King's virility is the lifeblood of the realm. But an insidious curse has put the kingdom on the precipice of a population panic. Enter Thomas Stone: architect, engineer, and unknowing half-blood heir to the goblin throne.

title: Gryff 5
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Gryff is fixated on returning home. His adventures carry him on a path to Vin with epic battles and awesome magic.

title: Apocalypse Core
author: Jack Porter
description: One moment, everything was normal. Then the World Core woke up and slaughtered almost everything alive so it could harvest their Chi. After that, it rebuilt everything and put the survivors in a game-like environment, pitting them against monsters and each other.

title: Martial Arts vs Magic, Book 1
author: The Veiled Man, Hikaru Genji
description: Someone once asked: What is stronger? Martial arts or Magic? I answered: Why not simply use both?

title: A Thousand Li: The Fourth Wall
author: Tao Wong
description: The half-Immortal tyrant of Cai has been defeated, but at a devastating cost. Wu Ying has sacrificed both his chance at immortality and his greatest treasure. Now, gravely injured and with his cultivation path shattered, he has to rebuild with the help of his friends.

title: Fleabag 2: A Monster Evolution LitRPG
author: SomeoneToForget
description: Evolving with human traits that conflict with its animal nature, a wolf is stalked by those seeking to capture and control it, in this grimdark fantasy.

title: The Demonic War: A Blood Magic Lycanthrope LitRPG
author: Shane Purdy
description: After growing far stronger throughout her time on Tartarus, Scarlet is finally ready to move on. To return to Earth. And to finally join the war between the humans and demons. But first she has to figure out how to return home. And to do that, she may have to take up a Demon Lord's offer.

title: Mayor of Mythos
author: Han Yang
description: Right as the world comes to an end, Devon is presented with an opportunity to escape Earth's demise. A most unusual benefactor grants him an opportunity at a new life in a land of magical cards, mythical creatures, and unique pedestals to manage his progress.

title: Regressor Sect Master
author: Spaizzzer
description: His end is the start of a new path. Tundra Fox, a cultivator of immense power and Sect Master of the Verdant Snow Sect, faces an eldritch god from beyond and dies. But that's only where his story begins.

title: Anarchist
author: Alexander Olson
description: With an army marching on the liberated city of Halsmet, Nathan and his allies are prepared to fight to the death. Giantsrest may have overwhelming magical might, helmed by the nearly immortal archmage Badud—but Nathan has a few tricks of his own.

title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks
author: Kenny King
description: A hilarious and addictive first book by Kenny King, a cultivation fantasy/system optimization series—perfect for fans of Beware of Chicken and He Who Fights With Monsters—where an underpowered hero must level up in a strange fantasy world through sheer determination and endless persistence...

title: Wild Era 2
author: David North
description: The Lord of Wildfire has been reborn, but the Wild Era is full of dangers and his strength needs to rise. He has disrupted the plans of Baron Verasun and the Sarathian Empire, creating enemies both near and far, while the enemies who killed him in his first life are still out there.

title: Death: Genesis 8: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: In pursuit of magical power, a young warrior finds himself waging war on behalf of a subjugated people—and becoming a king—in this dark-fantasy adventure.

title: System Summoning: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Progression
author: Sean Dunning
description: The vampires that once haunted Wichita are gone, reduced to ash. But Terry’s real war is only beginning. Topeka is burning, caught in the ruthless crossfire of S-ranked tyrants locked in a game of conquest. While the city suffers, the supers wage war.

title: Overpowered Wizard 2: A Progression LitRPG Epic
author: Hunter Mythos
description: What if a Florida Man is a threat to the System, Universe, and Beyond?

title: Nameless Sovereign 3
author: Nameless Author
description: Red has never been closer to the power of a true cultivator.

title: Unbelievable Healer
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: After inadvertently triggering the start of Developmental Phase 4 with the destruction of The Citadel, Thaden learns from his squirrel companion, Sadia, what the Wildlands has in store for him and the other Contenders.

title: Damsels of Jormia Omnibus: Books 1-3: An Isekai Adventure
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Transported to a land of myth and magic, Nolan scrambles to adjust in a realm where he contains magic. Of course, some lovely locals are in desperate need of a savior as the vile ratkin invade. Destined to unleash his power upon the wicked, he may just save some damsels along the way.

title: Death: Genesis 10: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: A young champion declares war against a tyrannical empire, bringing him into conflict with the woman he once loved in this dark fantasy adventure.

title: Magus Reborn 3
author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
description: Kai had defeated the beast wave and had been promoted to Count. But problems don't seem to end for him.

title: Aspirant
author: Alexander Olson
description: The Ascendent Academy has fallen, but Nathan's journey is just beginning. He has a mission—to journey across Davrar to find Sarya Pamaris, a friendly Questor who can begin to answer his questions. Hopefully she will reveal to him the secrets of the Endings, and how to stop them.

title: Dungeon Heroes Omnibus: Books 1-6
author: Shane Hammond, Marcus Sloss
description: The complete series in a single offering! Develop my team, dive the dungeons, and don’t ever stop.

title: The Academy (A LitRPG Progression Adventure)
author: Hikaru Genji, The Veiled Man
description: The six-month penalty has ended, and my life at the Academy began. It is now time to establish my Demonic Sect, recruit members, and make a name for myself. At least, that is how it should have been.

title: Tree of Aeons 6: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: SpaizZzer
description: Aeon's expansion has finally attracted the attention of the demons, and they've sent a demonic comet headed towards Aeon's world. Aeon and the Order will now have to plan, build new weapons and tools, expand their forces, learn new powers, and equip themselves to deal with the massive comet that...

title: Tree of Aeons 7: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: SpaizZzer
description: Book 7 of an epic reincarnation/isekai LitRPG story about a man who becomes a tree, growing and progressing throughout the ages in an eternal conflict against a demon incursion.

title: The Frontier Tavern & the Master Crafter
author: Ryan Eisenhower
description: A talking tree, three exquisite ladies, and a mission to save the universe.

title: Death: Genesis 9: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: Joining a long lost companion, a young champion embarks on a quest that will increase his godlike power—and challenge his humanity—in this dark fantasy.

title: The Lost Bloodline 2
author: M. Tress
description: Drawn to another world at the behest of a goddess without hope, thrown into conflict to protect a people on the brink of destruction, and drawn into a conflict millennia old, Koda Burke should have been upset at the very least.

title: Shadows of Mallin: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
author: AvaritiaBona
description: An otherworlder transported into a dragon's body must grow her skills, build her hoard, and forge friendships in the first book of a charming isekai series.

title: Arena Manager
author: Chad Opo
description: Frank lived for his three sons, busting his back to see they thrived in comfort. His good for nothing wife, she made him the happiest man in the world when she finally agreed to his divorce terms. His glorious day turned to ruin when an explosion hurls him through an unformed portal connection.

title: The Lost Bloodline 3
author: M. Tress
description: A town rescued from its fate. Duty is done and his home is now safe from the threat of the Crooked. Koda Burke was ready for a rest from the breakneck pace he’d endured since arriving on this new world.

title: The Lost Bloodline 4: An Isekai Epic
author: M. Tress
description: With winter settling over the land, now is the time to warm the hearth and spend time with family. However, the duties of a champion never truly end to his people.

title: Overpowered Wizard 3
author: Hunter Mythos
description: What if a Florida Man fights in a Multiverse Tournament?

title: The Science of Cultivation
author: randombluecat
description: Reincarnated into a world of cultivation, Scientist Langley Seiker no longer has to dream about immortality. It's now possible. Except for the fact that he has no talent.

title: Isekai Isles
author: Marcus Sloss
description: When a bridge collapses, Ryan should have died. Instead, his refusal to succumb is noticed and he is saved. A sage being transports him to a strange magical realm filled with floating islands, deadly battles, sinister puzzles, and unique challenges.

title: Player Manager 6: A Sports Progression Fantasy
author: Ted Steel
description: Recovered from a near-fatal assault and rearmed with his embedded football scouting skills, former nobody Max Best has led his Chester men's team up in the rankings and ratings both on the pitch and in the front office. But there's no rest to be had with what's ahead: the FA Cup.

title: Bonded Summoner Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: JJ Bookerson
description: 3 volumes in a single offering! Delving dungeons by day, relaxing with cute monster girls at night.

title: Conscripted
author: Patrick Underwood
description: Have you ever come across those stories with heroes who knew just how to get things done? The ones who were masters in five different martial arts, and knew ten ways to skin a bear after killing it with their bare hands? Yeah, that wasn’t me.

title: Ruby Mage Omnibus
author: Dan Raxor
description: Using a special ruby, Trevor discovers a fantasy world where powerful men obtain foxy ladies swish their tails, and magic is real. An awesome kicker—he's a ruby mage capable of turning his foes to cinder.

title: Apocalypse Knights 2
author: DB King
description: After venturing into the Forlorn Dungeon, Maximo Strident has obtained the Arcanist class and become a Knight-Errant. Now, he knows what lays within the strange dungeon: the future. The Apocalypse.

title: Nameless Sovereign 4
author: Nameless Author
description: Necromancers, demons, and ghosts—steeped in the forbidden arts, Red risks losing himself to the darkness he seeks to control. His efforts to protect his companions have come at a price and he finds himself entangled in a dangerous game with forces beyond his comprehension.

title: The Silent Archmage
author: Ghost Flower
description: Magic, danger, and epic fantasy collide in this spellbinding first book of the Silent Archmage series, where an archmage seeking peace enrolls in a magic academy, only to be swept into a treacherous magical adventure. Syl, an archmage who tirelessly fought the monsters spilling from the magical...

title: Soul Knight 4
author: J J Bookerson
description: Having liberated Shadowvale and cleansed Silverbrook of bandits, Nick's heroic deeds have made Frosthaven a true beacon of hope. And somehow, far too much attention from a group of priestesses and a giantess who walks loudly and carries a big stick.

title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine Book 3: An OP MC Isekai LitRPG
author: Azrie
description: The world below, where the corruption resides, a graveyard of worlds; it has many names, but it's now known as the Forgotten Places...

title: Deadworld Isekai 3: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: R. C. Joshua
description: When Matt was first sent to Gaia—a lifeless garden planet that had been consumed by system meddling—his only goal was to stay alive. Through a combination of grit, ingenuity, and a lot of help from his guardian, Lucy, he's managed to not only survive the worst but also thrive.

title: Depthless Hunger
author: Sarah Lin, Cognosticon
description: Kai is the hardest working warrior in his generation... and the unluckiest. In a world where most people receive magical skills, classes, or cultivation, Kai has nothing but his wits and his strength. His only choice will be to forge a new path against fate, no matter where it takes him.

title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
author: Kenny King
description: The first book in an action-packed, witty LitRPG series about a regular giu given a farm to cultivate when the world told him he would never be a hero. But when he proves more resourceful than anyone expected, he draws the attention of some very dangerous monsters to his farm… Nick was just...

title: Rogue Ascension 8: A Progression LitRPG
author: Hunter Mythos
description: [Last Time in Multiverse Z!] The Multiverse Crawlers slayed three major Demon Rulers back to back after paying a heavy price.

title: Veos, the Story of a Dungeon
author: Victor Storm
description: Beneath the surface of Nerian-Silex, the forces of mana and creation whirl, and something strange awakens, in this unique dungeon-core progression fantasy.

title: The Devouring Tide
author: WillPowah
description: Just when Kay thought he could relax, a new wave of terror crashes in. Eldritch horrors are emerging worldwide, and now the Seramist Isles are under threat.

title: Rebirth: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Luke Chmilenko, Harmon Cooper
description: The discovery of an enchanted heirloom sends a poor farm boy on a journey to master magic and vanquish evil in this epic LitRPG fantasy series.

title: Nameless Sovereign 5: A Cultivation Progression Fantasy
author: Nameless Author
description: Fresh off completing a crucial step in his cultivation, Red now prepares himself for a battle against his fate.

title: Arena Manager Boxset
author: Chad Opo
description: Frank lived for his three sons, busting his back to see they thrived in comfort. His good for nothing wife, she made him the happiest man in the world when she finally agreed to his divorce terms. His glorious day turned to ruin when an explosion hurls him through an unformed portal connection.

title: Player Manager 5: A Sports Progression Fantasy
author: Ted Steel
description: A one-time football fanatic continues his fight to become an all-time legend of the game in the fifth book of this hard-hitting, humorous sports LitRPG.

title: Mercenary Manager
author: Chad Opo
description: Nothing is perfect on Dorbin. Frank knowns the planet is rife with issues that only exacerbate his problems. After being run ragged all over Lornshire, he's eager to find a nice home.

title: Isekai Magus 4
author: Han Yang
description: A year has passed since Damien’s forces triumphed over their mortal enemies. Though the land seems peaceful, a demonic presence lies in wait just below the surface.

title: How I Became The World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 3
author: Kenny King
description: The third book in the hit LitRPG series, perfect for fans of Beware of Chicken and Dungeon Crawler Carl, where Chuck, an ordinary man thrust into a world full of magic and monsters, finds that gods and demons stand in the way of his deadliest challenge yet...reaching the elusive level 50. The...

title: The Lone Keeper
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: What happens when a new Keeper recruit inadvertently eliminates not only the other recruits, but all of the teachers, as well? At first, when Bax suddenly found himself transported from Earth to an organization of powerful, universe-spanning races, he was thoroughly confused.

title: One Flew over the Dragon's Nest: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Bosloe
description: In this portal fantasy, an accountant reincarnated as a fae assassin must battle, barter, and grind to survive in a world filled with magical dangers.

title: Hunting and Herbalism 2: A Druid LitRPG
author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
description: Dragged into hell by a ritual gone wrong, Zalia must escape before the souls of the damned and their demonic keepers locate her.

title: Wars: A LitRPG Adventure
author: V.A. Lewis
description: War is brewing on the horizon... Whether it was in the Netherworld, the Mortal Realm, or the Spirit Plane, war was coming. For some, it was already here.

title: The Tainted Khan
author: Taran Matharu
description: The next installment in New York Times bestselling author Taran Matharu’s Soulbound Saga--a thrilling cultivation and progression epic fantasy series--continuing the harrowing journey of Jai as he navigates returning to his own people, growing in his magic and as a warrior, fending off attacks...

title: Damsels of Jormia 3: The Final: A Light Novel
author: Marcus Sloss
description: With everything on the line, Nolan with do whatever it takes to save Jormia in this epic conclusion.

title: Wayward: Running: An Isekai LitRPG
author: T. A. Star
description: For as long as she can remember, Phoenix Fraser has been stuck. Stuck in the wrong body, losing both friends and family, and no future to plan for.

title: Ruby Mage
author: Dan Raxor
description: Using a special ruby, Trevor discovers a fantasy world where powerful men obtain foxy ladies swish their tails, and magic is real. An awesome kicker—he's a ruby mage capable of turning his foes to cinder.

title: Fight. Level. Survive.
author: xrmaze
description: When Mason wakes up naked and alone in a whole new world, everything changes. Lying there with blades of blue grass stabbing him in his ass, he has no idea just how chaotic his life is about to become.

title: Lord of the Dragon Riders Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Turner Tellborn, Marcus Sloss
description: A strange cry for help distracts Daniel from his boring study session. Curiosity gets the better of him and he is thrust through a portal where he emerges into a fantasy world of myth, magic, dragons and war.

title: Leap: An Isekai LitRPG
author: S. L. Winter
description: A desperate man is thrust into an unforgiving wilderness, where survival must be earned and every choice has a cost, in this slow-burn LitRPG adventure.

title: Crafter's Fate 1: A LitRPG Adventure
author: DB King
description: Those granted Fates from the Gods can become so much more than human…they are the Fated. Alastair is one such Fated. Gifted with the Crafter Class after his village is decimated, he can now create priceless enchanted gear.

title: Wish Upon the Stars 5
author: Malcolm Tent
description: Shane and Callie must push their training to the limit for the Moonsong Glade tournament. Victorious but weary after the battle for Starburst Pavilion, Shane and his team return home to Valen. It’s there they see just how far they’ve come since they first became Ascendants.

title: Corrupted Cardsmith
author: Daman
description: A slum rat like Shouren doesn’t have much in life. He picks peaches to survive. Dreams of buying a [Common] Class Card one day. But even that hope is stolen from him. Broken, bleeding, and left for dead, Shouren crawls inside the dungeon—desperately reaching for the floating card in front of him.

title: System Warrior Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Shane Hammond
description: The complete series in a single offering! Survive the apocalypse, conquer in the arena, and become the ultimate gladiator.

title: Tempest
author: DB King
description: For all his 21 years, Zephyr has been a cultivator of the Carefree Path and a martial artist. He always assumed he would take the vows and become a monk, but his plans are thrown to the wind when he receives a letter from the Grand Sage to attend the Schools of Elemental Magic.

title: Black Rain: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: Roland Carlsson
description: The black rain is coming. After a millennium of slumber, the old Gods have awakened.

title: Shadows of Gold: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
author: AvaritiaBona
description: An otherworlder in the body of a dragon must employ all her cunning to play a dangerous political game in the third book of this charming isekai series.

title: Wandering Magus King
author: Jace Cannon, Marcus Sloss
description: Ron was just a trucker with a long haul ahead until he wakes up in a strange fantasy realm.

title: Rise of the Isekai Hero: A LitRPG Fantasy
author: Jason Marino
description: One minute, Kaelan’s a marketing exec with a dreary life. The next, he’s summoned by a gorgeous priestess into a world of swords, magic, and a warlord out for his blood. He’s not sure it’s an improvement until he learns the rewards are most certainly worth the risks.

title: Ruby Mage 2
author: Dan Raxor
description: Trevor finds himself in a battle of survival mixed with conquest. His growing team of beauties not only dares to persist, but thrive. Join Trevor as he excels as the Ruby Mage!

title: World Core
author: Jack Porter
description: The first of the trials was just the beginning. The next ones are just as dangerous, but they come with an opportunity as well. They’re all about leveling up, more than I ever thought possible. If I can help my women (and my monster dog) make it through, we'll unlock the keys to infinite Chi.

title: Rise of the Fearless Leader
author: Walrus King
description: They were told to stay out of the ten-day war, but their side lost in the first hour. Their future is at stake, so now the Butcher and the other workers have to do the impossible: Win a war without anyone know they are fighting.

title: Leveling Up the World 10: A LitRPG Adventure
author: L. Eclaire
description: The epic culmination of a unique spin on Isekai LitRPG filled with countless pocket-realms to explore. A zero-to-hero, slow-build Progression Fantasy you won’t be able to put down.

title: Resistance Above Magic 3: A LitRPG Adventure
author: B.T. Narro
description: When Levy finds himself transported to an unknown place, discoveries of the past will soon shape the future—but it may not be the future that Levy was planning for.

title: Shadows of Karakan: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
author: AvaritiaBona
description: A human magically reborn into a dragon's body navigates friendships, alliances, and feuding gangs in the second book of this charming isekai series.

title: Soul Card
author: WillPowah
description: All he wanted was a fresh start. Now he’ll have to fight to keep it. Dryth is an outcast—unwanted by his family and ostracized by his peers. His only dream? To get his Soul Card and vanish somewhere far from home. But, as always, nothing goes according to plan.

title: The Legend of Kazro - Transcendent
series: A LitRPG Offworlder Saga: The Weak to Strong Hero Who Levels Up Quickly
author: D. R. R. Hatch
description: Kazro never asked for the quest. With nothing but a broken interface and dogged determination, he sets out to deliver a ceremonial scythe to a princess he’s never met. But when he glimpses her in the crowd, a jolt of familiarity strikes like thunder.

title: Hexinblade Academy
author: Patrick Underwood
description: Cal has somehow managed to survive his first weekend in a strange new world he knows next to nothing about. He has surrounded himself with a small cast of extraordinary women, a few friends, even a handful of adversaries. Hell, he even passed his first Core-trial!

title: The Seventh Sinner
author: Ghost Flower
description: The second thrilling installment in the epic Silent Archmage fantasy series unveils a tale of magic, war, and a kingdom on the brink of destruction. War is coming. The kingdom is not ready…but Syl is. Syl’s first semester at the Aurian Magical Institute has been more eventful than he hoped...

title: Path of Violence: A LitRPG Apocalypse
author: James Cook
description: When the world ends, some men find redemption in the ashes. Aiden Wyatt was a drug dealer, a thief, and a lost cause—until the System descended on Earth. Now, in a world where stats mean survival and monsters roam the wilderness, Aiden’s criminal past is his greatest weapon.

title: Castle Manager
author: Chad Opo
description: A home. Finally a home. Frank finds stability, eager to convert Team Zeppelin into a mighty empire who welcomes all. Those damn manipulators interfere and change everything. Suddenly, Frank becomes a Castle Manager, and so the adventure continues.

title: New Arcadia: Judgment Day
author: Eric Jason Martin
description: In a grim, not-so-distant future, humanity is in crisis. A deadly pandemic has confined billions to their homes, leaving society completely isolated in their homes and utterly dependent on the mega-global Chum Corporation.
narrator: Eric Jason Martin, Robert Patrick, Matthew Mercer, Erika Ishii, Sam Riegel, Dave Fennoy, Marin Ireland, January LaVoy

title: Wish Upon the Stars 6
author: Malcolm Tent
description: But Shane and his team must first navigate a perilous tournament filled with fierce rivals and dangerous conspiracies. As alliances shift and threats emerge, Shane must learn to trust his instincts, leverage his Wish ability, and forge a path through the chaos if he wants to achieve his destiny.

title: Apocalypse Knights 3
author: DB King
description: Maximo Strident and the Apocalypse Knights venture deeper into the Apocalypse Horizon. More and more dungeons appear, and it quickly becomes apparent that their previous methods might not cut it.

title: Isekai Park
author: Mike Caliban, Wolfe Locke
description: In the otherworld realm of Parknival Wonderland begins the story of a boy who loves a girl. Meet Grey, a former baker turned magical park manager, and Billie, a curious and innocent dungeon spirit who dreams of being human.

title: Isekai Assassin: The Complete Series
author: Grayson Sinclair
description: Contains volumes 1–4 of Isekai Assassin, a fast-paced story set in a Gamelit dark fantasy world written by the bestselling author of the Wyvern Academy series.

title: Welcome to the Dark Ages
author: Malory
description: Cultivation is all fun and games. Until someone kills Merlin. Apparently, the only logical response to this fairly important change to Arthurian lore is for me to be reincarnated into Dark Age Cornwall.

title: Wayward: Fighting: An Isekai LitRPG
author: T. A. Star
description: A teen transported to a world of magic and mayhem must navigate new alliances, strange abilities, and found family in the second book of this LitRPG series.

title: Turret Mage: An Isekai LitRPG
author: J. Drude
description: A teenage mechanic must battle nightmarish creatures and create formidable weapons to defend his new home from dark forces in this thrilling portal fantasy. When Ryan Kotes awakens on an alien planet, his mind is a complete mess.

title: Machinist of Mana: A Progression Fantasy
author: Wandering Agent
description: A shortcut through the woods transports a machinist to a new world in the first installment of this steampunk portal fantasy by the author of Melody of Mana.

title: King of the Fae Islands
author: Adam Lance, Annabelle Hawthorne
description: After rescuing a mysterious stranger, Gabriel is given a magical gift. Granted the ability to recreate anything he’s crafted with his own two hands: he has an impossible task. With Tablet in hand, he must restore the Fae Islands to their former glory.

title: The Alternate Keeper
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: The Lone Keeper has an entire world to protect, but that world is about to get a whole lot bigger…

title: Lost Souls and a Demoness 2
author: N. C. Lux
description: The clock is ticking for Earth, and in more ways than one. Dangerous monsters are pouring out of the Labyrinth, dimensional events scour resources from the land, and beneath it all, demonic plots begin to bear fruit.

title: Path of Time Deviant Omnibus: Books 1-4
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Allen Ming awakens in an unfamiliar realm, trapped within an unfamiliar form—feeble in body and spirit. Thrust into a world of cultivation, Allen Ming finds himself grappling with a reality of a wastrel body, and a world filled with danger and killing.

title: Dungeon Prime: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
description: A twisted artificial intelligence wreaks havoc for a team of adventurers in the fifth installment of this LitRPG adventure series perfect for fans of D&D.

title: Red Elf Ranch 3
author: Michael Dalton
description: Connor Mills’s ranch and family are thriving, but becoming the mayor of Willow Bend has brought fresh challenges to his life. As much as he’s achieved since coming to Faerie, greater mysteries remain.

title: Demonic Sect Elder Cultivates Righteous Disciples: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: Before meeting his pathetic and all-too-predictable demise in the middle of a pie-eating contest, Zack was living the high life: schlubbing around his parents' basement, subsisting on pizza, video games, computer screens, and web novels. He had it all . . . while still being a big, fat nothing.

title: Dragon's Heart
author: KrazeKode
description: The tournament awaits, holding great rewards and secrets behind it.

title: Red Elf Ranch: The Omnibus Edition
author: Michael Dalton
description: A cowboy is just a man with guts and a horse. Connor Mills is only trying to earn some summer money for school by working the Green River Drift cattle drive in Wyoming. The Fates have something else in mind for him.

title: Cultivation Is a Game: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: A xianxia fan finds himself swept into a system-run world—and he's about to learn there's a rather harsh difference between fantasy and reality....

title: Magical Fusion Collection: Books 5-8
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: The Kingdom has changed more in his absence than he thought possible…

title: Isekai Farming
author: Tristan Rye
description: Each day, Owen rises with the sun. Creatures cheer as he shovels food into the trough. Enchanted plants dance and sway while he waters their stalks. This is a strange, wild world. A place where mushrooms can sprout sentience. A place where forest slimes make the best pets. It’s cozy. Simple.

title: Awakening the Angel System: Apocalypse
author: Dungeon Ducky
description: King Jack. The title was still foreign to Jack who had no love for the empire or the throne. But, with his loved ones secured and his daughter safe, Jack now has the opportunity to do one thing he never thought he could do. Be a father.

title: Amazonian Master
author: Stoham Baginbott, Josh Kendig
description: Troy Thunder, ex-US Secret Service, finds himself stuck on a mysterious island with nothing more than a knife and the shirt on his back. To survive, his skills will be put to the test.

title: Oops! All Yandere!
author: Leon West
description: Saving the world would be a lot easier if Kevin's destined partners would stop trying to murder each other.

title: These Hallowed Bones
author: Drew Kelly
description: Forgotten oaths stir in blood-soaked soil as bones rise from hallowed ground. Not a lone hero reborn, but a guardian forged of countless warriors’ final breaths. A silent champion shackled to the last desperate command that ended an age: Hold the line. Protect them all.

title: Rebuild the World: Alaska
author: Justin Marks
description: Devin moved to a small island town in Alaska for a fresh start. Now, his quiet life has turned into a fight for survival against plunging temperatures and an extraterrestrial invasion.

title: Ancient Vault
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Thrown into a world far away from his own city, Li Wei has no choice but to take help getting back to Five Firmament City from whomever he can find. And with his body cultivation sealed, he has more obstacles than before.

title: Rise of the Isekai Hero Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Jason Marino
description: One minute, Kaelan’s a marketing exec with a dreary life. The next, he’s summoned by a gorgeous priestess into a world of swords, magic, and a warlord out for his blood.

title: Inferno
author: DB King
description: After completing his first year at the Tempest School, Zephyr ventures into the realms protected by the Phoenix Knights. There, he will learn Inferno magic and delve deeper into the mystery of his origins. Joined by Nella and Vincent, he will discover what it truly means to be Caruthas reborn.

title: My Demonic Farm Book 2: A Progression Fantasy LitRPG
author: WhisperingSnow
description: Theo barely survived the deadly poison that nearly claimed his life, but survival is only the beginning of his journey. As he recovers, a new fire ignites within him, pushing him to leave Ashenvale village and forge a new path.

title: A Clockwork Ogre: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Bosloe
description: An unlikely hero is embroiled in village politics, a fantastical war, and an orphan's vengeful quest in the second book of this portal fantasy series.

title: Trailer Park Goblins
author: Micky Carre, Michael Dalton - foreword, Adam Lance - foreword
description: I was having the perfect day when I suddenly found myself on the wrong side of an interdimensional portal. Instead of a weekend in wine country, I wound up in a trailer park that seemed stuck in the 1980s and filled with... goblin women?

title: Sapphire: A Cultivation Saga
author: Maxwell Farmer
description: Kiru the half-elf has traveled the length and breadth of Alterra—a world born from the ruins of Ragnarok and a long-gone Earth—searching for the lost treasures of his father, the slain King Ruken.

title: Ghost in the Machine
author: Ghost Flower
description: The new book in a spellbinding sci-fi/fantasy series about an archmage happy to enroll in a magical university and find freedom from battle, until the battle comes looking for him anyway... The moon is falling. War is coming. The time for action is now. Cascadia and Auria have felled each other...

title: Mage Academy 6
author: Kal Griffith
description: Ten years after saving the Empire, Ascended Mage Danny Youngblood faces a different kind of battle. His revolutionary teaching methods have made him enemies among the traditional mages at the Imperial Academy.

title: Arcane Knight Omnibus: Books 4-6
author: Timothy McGowen
description: Caldor has survived the War, but the scars it left behind run deep. Though he managed to save many lives, he lost friends in the process of it all. Forces have been set into motion that won't wait and soon Caldor finds himself back in the Southlands to help his mentor and friend Warrick.

title: Champion
author: Jake Brannigan
description: To save his best friend, he must defeat the best of the best. Despite his heroic efforts, Glenn Graybreaker’s only chance to resurrect his best friend is now to compete, and win, in the prestigious Sandsea Cup. If he and Becka can place highly in this tournament of duels, mazes, and monster...

title: Twinned Destinies
author: Adastra339
description: Prophecy tells of a hero who shall slay the Lord of Demons—but this is not his story. This is the story of his twin. Where he has a magical core of unparalleled talent, she has none at all. Where he is celebrated, she is shunned Yet she refuses to accept her fate.

title: Rise of the Isekai Hero 2
author: Jason Marino
description: Kaelan returns with a Rune Sage class, an assassin-in-training and a seasoned paladin at his side. Drakos is still at large, Morvak looms on the horizon, the pyramid is packed with lethal traps, and a legendary artifact could tip the scales. Welcome back to Valorah—where the stakes are divine.

title: I'm an Isekai Hero! Of Course I'm Fighting a Demon Lord: A LitRPG Fantasy Adventure
author: Edie Skye, H.P. Holo
description: It’s been three months since Axel Hunter Radcliff fell through a magic portal into another world of dangerous monsters. Hailing from a family of Chosen Ones, he’s trained his whole life to be a hero. He just didn’t expect destiny to involve taming monster girls into semi-civilized adventurers.

title: Finding Dao: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: His cultivation is broken. His soul fractured. And he is trapped—locked inside a realm ruled by an unseen force that plays with fate like a gameboard.

title: Fight. Level. Survive. 2
author: xrmaze
description: Mason thought he was getting the hang of this whole “trapped in another world” thing, kill monsters, level up and try not to die. Simple, right? Wrong. Now, he’s dealing with cultists, a prophecy, and a whole lot of people (and monsters) who want him dead.

title: Dark Matter Ascension: Book 4
author: SerasStreams
description: Jace Seren has achieved what no others have before: become a Tier 10 Ascendant within The Cosmic System. As part of this achievement, he is now permanently infused with it and can never lose the phenomenal powers he has gained.

title: Demonic Sect Elder and the Sealed Realm: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: In the second book of this hilarious xianxia series, a loser turned martial arts master embraces his badass role . . . until he screws it up . . . as usual.

title: Ancient Decree: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Li Wei's friend is in danger, and he is a man who never looks away from helping a friend. But he doesn't know that this call for help will lead him into a game played by players much higher than his level.

title: Growth: An Isekai LitRPG
author: S. L. Winter
description: A man must determine who he wants to be as he faces new threats and battles prehistoric killing machines in the second book of this gripping portal fantasy.

title: Ancient Constitution: A Wuxia/Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Li Wei finds himself stuck in a cultivation bottleneck, due to complex rules of simultaneous qi and body cultivation. This predicament sets him on a challenging journey that will push him to his limits.

title: Goddess Expansion
author: Rain Harlow
description: After the harrowing events of a fateful encounter with the very best of the Dominion wizards and psionicists, the Goddess Samantha and her realm must deal with the fallout. Souls, as always.

title: My Demonic Farm, Book 3
author: WhisperingSnow
description: After narrowly escaping death, Theo finds himself at the prestigious Phoenixwing Academy, saved by a mysterious woman and Rowan. His world is expanding in ways he never imagined.

title: Hunting and Herbalism 4: A Druid LitRPG
author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
description: Zalia has destroyed hellish forces in an attempt to bring peace to Endaria—yet a more nebulous enemy now rears its head . . .

title: Isekai Exorcist
author: Dosei
description: After flunking the entrance exam to his dream university, Temaru Ryūta is left behind by all his friends and becomes a shut-in while preparing for next year's exams.

title: Divine Elements Omnibus: Books 1-5: An OP MC Xianxia
author: Daman
description: Books 1-5 in the Divine Elements an OP MC Xianxia series are now available in this special omnibus bundle, filled with action, adventure, and epic cultivation!

title: Unranked Ascension 1: A LitRPG Apocalypse
author: Perry Okeefe
description: Humanity's guardian is dead, monsters roam freely, and only those who grow stronger will survive.

title: Climbing the Ranks 3
author: Tao Wong
description: For Arthur, climbing the beginner Tower of Malaysia was a way out, a chance to escape the grinding poverty of a future with no jobs. It's a chance to make something of himself. Then he received a Clan seal, became a leader by accident, and most importantly, became responsible for others.

title: Upheaval: An Isekai Adventure
author: Travis Albrecht
description: Transported into a fantastical realm populated by myths and monsters, a mother and daughter learn to use magic—and sow the seeds of revolution.

title: Warriors of Valhalla Omnibus Books 1-3
author: Tim Steiner
description: Blake never expected to meet beautiful women while studying archaeology — let alone a stunning Valkyrie. Dying was a bit of a bummer, but the chance to see Asgard with his own eyes was well worth it.

title: Way of the Immortals: The Complete 4-Book Series
author: Harmon Cooper
description: When Nick Barnette is pulled through a mysterious portal into the Kingdom of Lhasa, his life becomes a fight for survival. Separated from his friends and hunted by powerful forces, Nick discovers he’s been gifted a strange ability—the power to slow time.

title: Gunsoul
author: Maxime J. Durand, Void Herald
description: Marauders shot Yuan in the head and buried him in a ditch. They thought it would be enough to put him down. They were wrong.

title: Ruby Mage 3
author: Dan Raxor
description: Trevor is the fabled Ruby Mage, a true master of the flame. His home, his people, his family; they mean everything to him. When a powerful dragon threatens everything he's built, he'll stop at nothing to defeat his enemy.

title: Goblins: Keep Out!
author: Alexey Kovtunov, Dmitry Dornichev, Sofia Gutkin - translator
description: It turns out that this world is far from simple. The sharp-toothed rabbits around the village were thought to be the greatest enemy at first. But then came the squirrels . . . The humans dealt with them too and things seemed to be going well until—surprise!—the wolves appeared.

title: Ladies Just Wanna Get Guns: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
description: A dungeon named Kelsey and a beautiful baroness on a covert mission join forces in this LitRPG fantasy that's full of adventurers, assassins, and ammo.

title: MagiCraft Master: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
author: Wilbur Woods
description: A young artist implanted with a sophisticated AI becomes humanity's champion on another world in this thrilling science-fiction fantasy-adventure series.

title: Glass Kanin: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: Kia Leep
description: As a rising actor, Kanin's body is his career. His identity. His life. All that is taken from him when he dies and is reborn as a bottle of ink. Now living as the heart of a magical glass servant, Kanin's new purpose is to perform a senile wizard's yard work.

title: Alpha Agent
series: Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk LitRPG
author: Kevin Do
description: Dan Erikson lay cold and alone, bleeding to death. After a disastrous gang fight, Dan’s life has run its course on the crime-ridden streets of New York. But the mysterious Alpha Corporation intervenes and drags him from the brink of death.

title: Shaping: An Isekai LitRPG
author: S. L. Winter
description: In this gripping portal fantasy, a man must gather his strength to battle old foes and meet the demanding challenges of the wilderness he now calls home.

title: Fight. Level. Survive. 3
author: xrmaze
description: Captured and Alone. Can Mason do what he must in order to escape and survive?

title: Mayor of Mythos 2
author: Han Yang, Ike Summers
description: Despite all the odds, Devon has conquered his way into a stronghold on Mythos. Hard work, luck, and determination have built him a home. But will the magic, cards, and friends Devon’s made be enough to stop the enemies of humanity and the ongoing threats?

title: An Unprecedented Prospect Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Rise!, Sebastian Guzman
description: An Unprecedented Prospect Omnibus tells the story of Blair Blackenskiff as he dives into a new world and the fierce competition he was dropped into. The challenges, the allies, the enemies, the mysteries—Blair will get a taste of them in this Isekai Gamelit adventure.

title: Crafter's Fate 2
author: DB King
description: Alastair and Damon venture out of the Middle Kingdom. As always, they seek to gather the finest materials to craft items worthy of the gods. Their journey brings with it great dangers, and they uncover secrets beneath the earth that speak of humanity's origins in this world.

title: Terminus
author: Jason Cheek
description: Stellar Frontier is the newest sensational hit that has taken the world by storm. It's the first fully immersive virtual reality Sci-Fi MMORPG on the market.

title: Quest and Conquer Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Kaz Velveto
description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work. Unfortunately, the new world I respawned in is a monster-infested battleground between the Deep Ones and the Outer Gods.

title: Nocturne, Book 4: Sanguine Necropolis
author: JD Glasscock
description: Gideon has healed himself and escaped the assassination attempt by the System itself. He came out of it still Copper while all the movers and players were Iron with the System's last ditch effort to see him dead with time dilation tricks.

title: Kevin, the Hellbringer
author: A. Bel
description: A light-hearted, humorous LitRPG adventure of monstrous proportions! Firefighting was tough, but Kevin took pride in it—until a factory fire landed him in a swamp with a monstrous new body and a mountain-sized cube dominating the landscape. Now, survival means more than just putting out fires.

title: Blossoming Path: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Carlos Calma
description: When a mysterious force opens the world to ascension, a young herbalist must cultivate his skills, meanwhile discovering traces of a lost civilization.

title: Despair's Demise: A Progression Fantasy
author: Jamie Kojola
description: With seven gods down, only the Overgod is left, in the last installment of this witty isekai adventure series.

title: Isekai General
author: Alex Tanway, Marcus Sloss
description: After some rough tours during the Drone Wars, Reggie finds himself visiting a best friend's mausoleum. As he's paying his respects, a visitor from a land of myth and magic offers him a chance to bring Gary back—but there's a catch.

title: Rise of the Isekai Hero 3
author: Jason Marino
description: Elara is missing, Morvak’s invasion is imminent, and Kaelan is once again questioning his life choices. What was supposed to be a stealthy in-and-out mission quickly turns into a rescue operation—with a side of war, betrayal, and unexpected alliances.

title: Isekai General Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Marcus Sloss, Alex Tanway
description: After some rough tours during the Drone Wars, Reggie finds himself visiting a best friend's mausoleum. As he's paying his respects, a visitor from a land of myth and magic offers him a chance to bring Gary back—but there's a catch.

title: Marketcrafters
author: Chris Hughes
description: A revelatory and unexpected examination of the political economy of the past century—and an argument that policymakers in government, not the mythical “free market,” created the most dynamic economy the world has ever known. For many decades, a sacred myth has ruled the minds of...

title: Lord of the System, Book 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
author: Furious Miki, Alex Toxic, Reuben Woolley - translator
description: The System said: "everything the sun touches is yours!" Lord Leo's a simple guy, so he took the System's word for it. It's not for nothing that Major is running drills with the new recruits, Third is sharpening his trusty sapper shovel, and boar-riding Peter is digging the earth with a honed hoof.

title: Kill Class Unlocked
author: Gloam
description: I always figured I’d eventually get killed in my line of work. I just assumed I’d stay dead at that point. I was the one people hired to do the killing, after all. I knew a thing or two about how death worked.

title: Journey to the Dark Tower
author: Malory
description: Nothing ruins your day like a quest with a ransom note. Especially when you're a fake wizard with real problems. I was supposed to be dead. Instead, I'm stumbling through medieval Britain with Merlin's ghost backseat-driving my magical education.

title: The Mirror World Progression Saga Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Rain Harlow
description: Sammy struggled through college until she's magically transported to another realm. In this new world, she's been transformed into the wholly (holy?) different form of a goddess.

title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Tismon
description: In the first book of this Lovecraftian dark fantasy, an ordinary man finds himself in extraordinary circumstances—and responsible for the fate of humanity.

title: Rise of a Manor Lord 2
author: T.E. Bakutis
description: Drake has secured his manor and his people’s loyalty. Now, it’s time to go on offense. Confronted with a mandatory summons from the capital city, Drake reluctantly takes his new manor on the road.

title: The Twelve Apocalypses, Book 1
author: AT Valentine
description: The universe is big, and Hayden's about to invade it. Being drafted into a demon army wasn't on Hayden's bucket list. But when his soul is shoved into a human soldier on the eve of a new invasion, it’s not exactly like he can appeal the decision.

title: Warborn, Book One: Crucible
author: JD Glasscock
description: The Crucible of War—A floating asteroid the size of a small planet carving its way through the universe. Eight Cities, a million participants, death, blood, carnage, control.

title: Quest for the Dark Blade
author: Malory
description: When the kingdom wobbles, there's only one way to steady it—grab a legendary sword. Simple, right? Wrong.

title: Master of Swords 3
author: Marcus Sloss, Hunter Dane
description: The Death God’s on the move. Now the Master of Swords must rise to the occasion and rescue a final Swordmaiden even as war threatens to rip his new home apart!

title: Tonic Shop at the Edge of the World
author: Max Vale
description: Mason Curacao is a big dreamer with an even bigger legacy to uphold. After the unexpected deaths of his famous Alchemist parents, it’s been a long, lonely summer for the new Alchemy Academy graduate.

title: Incursion II
author: Dennis Vanderkerken
description: Dii Van Damme is eight feet tall, built like a siege engine, and powered by stolen cosmic glitches. With a talking ferret, a janitor’s badge, and the mysterious BlackBox, he’s survived Eldritch Realms and weaponized the chaotic system known as Wrong Warp.

title: God Game 1
author: T.E. Bakutis
description: Every thirty years, an ancient god hosts a very dangerous game.

title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune 2: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Tismon
description: A reluctant hero faces mythical monsters and cursed ghosts as he quests to save humanity from cosmic horrors in this Lovecraftian dark fantasy series.

title: The Last Portal Jumper: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez -translator
description: When I died and became a portal jumper, the system glitched. Did that bother me? Not a bit. After all, I'd dreamed of traveling to a different world all my life! The system malfunction turned out to only benefit me. I didn't just lose nothing; I also gained something really cool.

title: Rise of the Dragon Hunter 2
author: Malcolm Fortin, Marcus Sloss
description: Armed with his magical sword, a handy crossbow, and a staff to direct his psychic powers, Mark and his all-female airship crew of the Rum Runner embark on a perilous journey through the clouds for their next dragon to slay.

title: Cherno Caster 2
author: Akaso
description: You can strip Brunhilde Krahe of her cybernetics. Tear her from the Megacity. Hurl her across worlds. But you cannot change what she is. A crusader will always remain a crusader.

title: Goddess Alchemy
author: Rain Harlow
description: The heart of a war-like people claimed by a new Face of the Goddess after her heroic, brutal slaying of a corrupted legend, the Goddess moves to press her advantage. War is coming.

title: Amazonian Master 2: An Isekai Survival Fantasy
author: Stoham Baginbott, Josh Kendig
description: Troy Thunder, ex-US Secret Service, is still fighting for survival while leading a tribe of monster girls. Mythical Spaniards threaten to destroy everything he's built to accomplish their own dark plans. To survive, Troy will need new alliances to deal with this new threat.

title: Corpo Age
author: RandomBlueCat
description: Rollo believed that money ruled the world. Then his world came crashing down. Now, Rollo finds himself in a dystopian, corporate-ruled world where where greed and exploitation are the norm.

title: Mors Immatura
author: JD Glasscock
description: The Second Challenge is pushing them to the brink of losing all they hold dear, Dungeons, and they must be conquered or they all will unleash their denizens across the entire World of Erebus.

title: New Beginnings: An Isekai LitRPG
author: A. T. Valentine
description: Every epic foe sees a hero or two rise to save the day, protect the helpless, and vanquish evil; unfortunately, there are three heroes this time....

title: Damsels of Jormia
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Transported to a land of myth and magic, Nolan scrambles to adjust in a realm where he contains magic. Of course, some lovely locals are in desperate need of a savior as the vile ratkin invade. Destined to unleash his power upon the wicked, he may just save some damsels along the way.

title: Isekai General 3: A LitRPG Fantasy
author: Alex Tanway, Marcus Sloss
description: When a mortal soldier is transformed by divine fury, the war between mortals and gods erupts into a cataclysmic battle that will shatter magic itself.

title: Magic Kingdom at War Complete Series Box Set
author: Tao Wong
description: You'd think being isekai'd to a new existence would be fun, especially when you find out you're the lord of a new kingdom. Except this kingdom is at war, and the stakes are the fate of humanity.

title: Offworlder: Ten Lives Left
author: D. R. R. Hatch
description: Zale is horrified. He’s in a completely new body on an entirely different planet, and wants nothing else but to return home. But his hopes are shattered when his only way back becomes the focal point for a deadly cultist—one who calls down a flaming storm of death.

title: American Isekai: Entrance into Madness
author: Curtis Yost
description: Death is only the beginning. A man with a shattered memory remembers his death. From the moment of his death, he goes on a wild ride through the after life where he slowly is broken down mentally by dark forces. The dark forces lead him to a gate called the Gate of Redemption.

title: Isekai General 2
author: Alex Tanway, Marcus Sloss
description: War never rests, and neither can Reggie.

title: The Last Portal Jumper: Book 2
author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
description: Alone in a strange world of dungeons, quests, combat academies, guild wars, tournaments, and learning magic . . . It's all so wonderful! Of course, the hordes of orcs approaching the Empire's borders are a bit unsettling. As is the mysterious organization crippling it from within. But what if...

title: God Game 3: A Gamelit Thriller
author: T.E. Bakutis
description: After surviving two death games, they’ve finally earned a vacation. Ryler Copeland and Juliet Cooper might not be mortal any longer, but they’re still madly in love, even if they can only see each other once every few months.

title: The Last Portal Jumper, Book 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy Series
author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
description: To continue training at the guild in the capital, or pack it in and get out before the orcs take the city by siege? For answers to this and other questions, check out the latest issue of "F—k If I Know" magazine! And it sure would be nice if the greenskins were the only threat. In any case...

title: MagiCraft Master 2: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
author: Wilbur Woods
description: Fighting for the fate of humanity on an alien world, a young man and his AI implant learn how to master magic, in this progression sci-fi/fantasy mashup.

title: Traveller's Trial
author: Chikao J
description: Koji Athame left his house for the first time in five years today. When what was supposed to be a quick trip to visit his parents, turns into a deadly crash. Koji finds himself waking up in a realm of danger and wonder beyond his wildest imagination.

title: Resurrection!: A Ridiculous Vampire Isekai, Book 1
author: Randall Tatum
description: A young businessman dies, and in the process of crossing over, his soul accidentally drifts where it doesn’t belong. The new body he’s acquired? A 3,000-year-old vampire, charmingly named Vampir.

title: The New Dark Lord: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
description: In the first installment of this epic of magic and battle, a powerful necromancer comes to the aid of a nation in peril—but is he a savior or a threat?

title: God Game 2
author: T.E. Bakutis
description: Juliet Cooper’s life isn’t exciting, but it’s secure. She works at a sandwich shop, babysits her little brother, and helps her parents out with the bills. She also has no idea she used to be dead.

title: Damsels of Jormia 2
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Transported to a land of myth and magic, Nolan scrambles to adjust in a realm where he must master his new powers. Jormia proves as thrilling as it is challenging in this next installment. Join Nolan as he navigates the dangers and saves the damsels.

title: My Magus Academy Is Run By Players!? 2
series: My Magus Academy is Run By Players!?
author: Astralium
description: The game’s getting real, and the Headmaster’s past Is coming back to haunt him.

title: Rise of the Dragon Hunter 3
author: Malcolm Fortin, Marcus Sloss
description: The game has changed. The dragons are expanding faster than ever. Many of them aren’t obeying the command of their goddess. And the Cult of the Dragon has no idea why. If left unchecked, the world could descend into chaos unlike anything seen before.

title: The Forerunner
author: James Clay
description: Zed is a washed-up MMA fighter that is starting to realize that there isn't much of a future ahead of him.

title: Peak Performance: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kleggt
description: A new magician is on the scene, and he's got demons in tow, in this adventure-filled portal fantasy that's perfect for fans of role-playing games.

title: The Last Power War: A Superhero Slice-of-Life LitRPG
author: Aest Belequa
description: With the final Power War at hand and human Extras in peril, Magical Girl Understudy must choose between her role . . . and her mission.

title: Displacement: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: J. D. Mullenary Sr.
description: In this portal fantasy, a former teacher must learn to become a god to survive the Creator Wars and build a harmonious world amidst the stirrings of war.

title: Rebellion
author: Arlo Adams
description: The first shots in the Ruballian civil war have been fired. Nodes vital to the king, captured. Sieges commenced. Unseen forces operate in the shadows to meet their own objectives while the elven queen sits in a Brusarian prison.

title: Beyond the Blackboard
author: Kevin Walker
description: Hello, Welcome to my nightmare. My old name before waking up in a new world was Kevin. Now, my fellow prisoners call me Crow, the guards just call me scum and normally follow it up with some kind of kick, hit, or whip. I was your classic nerdy history substitute teacher.

title: Apocalypse Reaver 2: A Dark Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
author: TobascoAsako
description: Gilgamesh is no longer a slave, but freedom comes with a price. Still adapting to the savage world of Gesthe, he is tasked with escorting a secretive half-elf to Al-Lazar, the City of Dust.

title: Rites and Wrongs: A Zombie Villainess LitRPG
author: Kleggt
description: In the thrilling third installment of this LitRPG adventure series, a Monster/Player mashup must ask herself: Can a glitched System ever really be fixed?

title: Author's Nightmare: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
description: When three friends find themselves in the grimdark fantasy world of their novel, they must grind, battle, and barter to survive the deadly landscape.

title: Author's Nightmare 2: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
description: Having secured a foothold—and a reputation for questing—in the fantasy world of their imaginations, three friends aim to champion the kingdom's tournament.

title: Staged and Scripted: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kleggt
description: In the second installment of this adventure-filled fantasy, your local magician and his party are set to dazzle once again—with a devilish twist.

title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 11
author: Tao Wong
description: With multiple enemy lords on each front, Matt has quite the challenge before him. Even with the multiple cities he's conquered, balancing the need for more units, future updates and traitorous lords is straining his patience and knowledge. Now, the enemy armies are coming, on all sides.

title: Scathing Reviewer: A Satirical LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: BananaDragon
description: When a despised isekai author's novel comes to life, she's challenged by opponents far more sinister than any demon or god: her past critics—and karma.

title: Reborn
author: Zoe Townley
description: Bound by a name, driven by a desire to become more, Cecily and Frost have survived their first battle and come out stronger for it. However, the bond they share comes with more than a way to communicate and a life long friendship; it comes with a death sentence....

title: Infernal Liberation
series: Rise of The Infernal Paladin - A LitRPG Apocalypse Adventure
author: Emrys Ambrosius, L.R. Monroe
description: If you crave LitRPGs with dark revenge, relentless action, and gripping character evolution, Rise of the Infernal Paladin will take you on an unforgettable ride. For fans of Diablo, Dresden Files, and the darker side of LitRPG.

title: Enora Online Boxed Set, Volumes 4-7: A LitRPG GameLit Fantasy Adventure
author: Arlo Adams
description: Follow G3m1n1 Fowler and his band of companions all the way to the final confrontation that will change the face of Enora Online.

title: The Lumina Crown
author: Mike Robb
description: Fifteen-year-old Eric thought he was just an ordinary teen until a twist of fate transported him to Ardentia, a magical realm teetering on the edge of chaos.

title: Celestials: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Wilbur Woods
description: Max became a living weapon to save humanity from an alien threat—only to discover the fate of the entire universe rests in his hands—in this portal fantasy.

title: Sam the Phoenix and Jake the Average Reincarnated Human
author: Mike Robb
description: Jake was just an average guy until a freak accident threw him into a new world—one filled with magic, monsters, and ancient dangers.

title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 12
author: Tao Wong
description: There are no victors in war. That's the refrain that goes through Matt Fang's mind. With losses mounting, not just among his units but his Heroes too, Matt is struggling with confidence and the mounting pressure. That's, of course, when a ship is sighted on the horizon; opening up a whole new front.

title: The Jade Pendant
author: Mister B
description: In sun-soaked Sandy Beach, California, fourth-grader Edgar faces a daunting first day at his new school. When he stumbles upon a mysterious jade pendant dropped during a clash between a masked swordsman and a demonic figure, Edgar’s world flips upside down.

title: Last Curtain Call: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kleggt
description: In the explosive finale of this adventure-filled fantasy, your local demonic magician takes his final bow—and a broken System draws its last breath.

title: Virtual Deviation
author: AL Traversky
description: After a bad breakup with his ex-girlfriend, a vacation on a quiet Island is supposed to help Neil recover and relax. But without warning, he finds his whole life reset. It's either an apocalypse across the whole of planet earth, or some kind of new, evil system.

title: The New Dark Lord 2: An Isekai Progression Fantasy
author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
description: The dark caster, Silenos, has conquered a kingdom and installed a princess as his puppet—but will an unseen force prove more powerful than his magic?

title: MagiCraft Master 3: A Mass Isekai LitRPG
author: Wilbur Woods
description: A young warrior infused with AI technology and magical powers must stop an eldritch god from unleashing an apocalypse in this science-fiction fantasy.

title: Blossoming Path 3: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Carlos Calma
description: With sects clashing all around him and a power struggle brewing, Kai must rely on his determination and growing skills to protect the people he loves.

title: The Crafter 2: The Enchanted City
author: Dan Sugralinov
description: Trapped in a deadly game, sixth-grader Kenny and his friends must survive a cursed wilderness where danger lurks behind every tree.

title: Virtual Deviation 2
author: AL Traversky
description: First 36 hours of the apocalypse completed. How much worse can a life reset alongside your ex and her hostile new boyfriend get? Neil and his small party have survived the initial cull on the vacation island. They've made enough early progression to fight off the first wave of mutated creatures.

title: That Time I Died, Met the Goddess, Got Reincarnated with Tina, and Defeated the Evil!
author: Mike Robb
description: What happens when an ordinary, overlooked office worker and a glamorous coworker are hit by a bus, meet a goddess, and wake up in a magical world? For Billy, it’s a second chance he didn’t know he needed. For Tina, it’s her worst nightmare.

title: Beyond the Veil: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Fobywoby, John Stax
description: Jace was never supposed to enter Terra Mythica—let alone become the chosen of Hades, lead a one-man underworld club, or moonlight as an exorcist for possessed teens with god-complexes. But after months trapped in this so-called game, the boundary between code and cosmos has shattered.

title: Locked In: A Gamelit Fantasy
author: M. J. Lau
description: Everett Starner is a nobody. He doesn't play sports. He's not smart enough to stand out in school. He's not really good at anything except video games, which would be fine ... if they didn't randomly trigger his epilepsy.

title: Oppose the System 2
author: System Lad
description: Most will die. Some will survive. A small few will thrive. My party and I cleared the dungeon in Griffith Park, got a ton of loot, and saved the safe zone.
